input: Email the marketing team. Put an at symbol before marketing. Say quote the campaign launches Monday end quote. Actually, make that Tuesday.
ideal: Email the @marketing team. Say "the campaign launches Tuesday".

input: Tell Sarah about the dinner plans. Tag Sarah with an at symbol. Say quote we're meeting at seven end quote. Wait, say six thirty instead.
ideal: Tell @Sarah about the dinner plans. Say "we're meeting at six thirty".

input: Message the design team. Put an at symbol before design. Tell them quote the mockups are approved end quote. Actually, say they're pending review.
ideal: Message the @design team. Tell them "they're pending review".

input: Notify Coach Martinez about practice. Tag Martinez with an at symbol. Say quote practice is at the main field end quote. Wait, make that the north field.
ideal: Notify Coach @Martinez about practice. Say "practice is at the north field".

input: Tell the finance team about the budget. Put an at symbol before finance. Say quote we have five thousand left end quote. Actually, say three thousand.

ideal: Text Dr. @Chen about the appointment. Say "the results need follow-up".

input: Tell Aunt Rosa about the flight. Tag Rosa with an at symbol. Say quote I land at noon end quote. Actually, say two in the afternoon.

input: Message the band manager. Put an at symbol before manager. Tell him quote the set list is finalized end quote. Scratch that, say we're still deciding.
